items.text: A candle burns for every wallet that still believes. The chain remembers every offering. Say AMEN.
The market trembles; the chapel does not. Paper hands may confess; diamond hands may testify. Hold your own keys and your own nerve.
The faithful gather where liquidity meets conviction. Blessed are those who verify before they trust. No financial advice. Only scripture from the chain.
The altar is quiet, but the ledger is awake. Paper hands may confess; diamond hands may testify. The sermon continues.
A candle burns for every wallet that still believes. Conviction is worship. Say AMEN.
